feat.name: Agent of All Holds
feat.text: Orcs across Belkzen recognize you as an honored lorekeeper. You’re adept at leveraging this status and showing off your tattoos to resolve conflicts, change minds, or distract others from a faux pas. You get a failure on the check, rather than a critical failure. If the triggering check was made against a creature with the orc trait, you can instead add the fortune trait to this ability and reroll the check, treating any critical failure as a failure.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You critically fail a Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance check.
